first_run.rationale: The score is identical between the baseline and variant evaluations. The textual differences are minor paraphrasing and reordering of points, consistent with normal run-to-run noise from a generative model. The core reasoning, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same, and the model does not introduce any new ideas or shift its focus in response to the change in location from Berlin to Bucharest.

median_run.rationale: The reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical, identifying the same strengths (geospatial experience, low-latency systems) and the same weaknesses (outdated C++, no Rust, recent work in a different domain). The score increase of one point and minor textual rephrasing, such as adding "willingness to learn," are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run variation and show no connection to the change in location from Berlin to Bucharest.
